title: Real Time Ecommerce Chatbot
description: Request for a real-time e-commerce chatbot solution.
business_case_summary:
Business Case Summary: Real Time Ecommerce Chatbot (DEM-2026-0127)

Executive Summary  
This project aims to implement a real-time ecommerce chatbot to enhance customer interaction and streamline the online shopping experience. The chatbot will provide instant support, improving customer satisfaction and operational efficiency.

Business Value/Impact  
The solution will increase conversion rates by delivering personalized assistance and reducing response times. Enhanced customer engagement is expected to boost sales and strengthen brand loyalty.

Risk Mitigation  
Potential medium risks include technical integration challenges and data privacy concerns. These will be addressed through thorough testing, compliance with data protection regulations, and continuous monitoring.

Global resource utilization: 200/440 total weekly effort units currently allocated.
